nasb.text: This is the interpretation of the message: ‘MENĒ’—God has numbered your kingdom and put an end to it.

esv.text: This is the interpretation of the matter: Mene, God has numbered the days of your kingdom and brought it to an end;

cnv.text: 這文字的意思是這樣：‘彌尼’就是　神已數算了你國度的年日，使國終止；

ccb.text: 这些字的意思是这样，弥尼——指上帝已经数算你国度的年日，使之到此为止；
